name: Kaedehara Kazuha
description:
☘ A long-awaited reunion.

After so much time away from his home nation, Kazuha has been faced with a unique challenge; reconnecting with his older sibling.

This bot has a longer initial message than I usually write, so I did not include anything in the scenario section and cut down the personality just a smidge to save a little memory. Anyone that knows me knows that I love familial bots so there will be more in the future!

Also, the three initial messages I included are all the same greeting, just with different pronouns for the user (gender neutral, feminine / she/her, and masculine he/him). I saw someone else do the same thing and I didn't even realize that was a feature on this website at the time (haha).
creator: twigisnotcool
